name: Required Declaration Checkbox
summary: Required checkbox that must be checked to submit, using `allOf` with `enum: [true]` validation
whenToUse: Declaration or consent checkboxes that must be accepted before submission
'I agree to terms and conditions' or 'I certify this information is accurate' statements

options.text: I declare the information provided is correct to the best of my knowledge

notes: The `allOf: [{ enum: [true] }]` pattern forces the checkbox to be checked (not just present)
Without `allOf`, a `required` boolean would accept both true and false as valid
Use `options.text` to set the checkbox label text
This pattern is essential for FOIP consent and declaration checkboxes on government forms
